heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 53111 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2024—Par. (3). , substituted “and 2024” for “2024, and 2025”.Pub. L. 118–159, § 3502(d)(1)Par. (4). , added par. (4). Former par. (4) redesignated (5).Pub. (5) redesignated (6).Pub. L. 118–159, § 3502(d)(2)Par. (6). , substituted “$411,300,000” for “$378,000,000” and “and 2030;” for “, 2030, and 2031; and”.Pub. (3) to (6). substituted “$318,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025;” for “$222,000,000 for each fiscal year thereafter through fiscal year 2025.” in par. (3) and added pars. children.text: $300,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2018, 2019, and 2020;
$318,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022, 2023, and 2024;
$390,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 and 2026;
$400,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 and 2028;
$422,400,000 for each of fiscal years 2031 and 2032.
$433,800,000 for each of fiscal years 2033 and 2034;
$445,560,000 for each of fiscal years 2035 and 2036;
$457,560,000 for each of fiscal years 2037 and 2038; and
$469,920,000 for each of fiscal years 2039 and 2040.
